cleavage agent: digested by a combination of LysC (Wako) and Trypsin (Promega)
collision energy: HCD fragmentation was applied with 30% collision energy
enrichment method: added to the pre-equilibrated Streptavidin-linked resin
instrument: coupled to the Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
labeling: The raw files and full output tables for mass spectrometry results are available through PRIDE repository
reduction concentration: added to a final concentration of 10 mM
